'''âd-t-h-z''' ('''kadathezoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:chameleonise|chameleonise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-t-h-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:chameleonise|chameleonise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âd-t-h-z
|-
! Lemma
| kadathezoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidathezoko|thidathezoko]] || [[word:jidathezoko|jidathezoko]] || [[word:shidathezoko|shidathezoko]] || [[word:kidathezoko|kidathezoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudathezoko|thuthudathezoko]] || [[word:jujudathezoko|jujudathezoko]] || [[word:shushudathezoko|shushudathezoko]] || [[word:kukudathezoko|kukudathezoko]]
|-

|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thudathezoko|thudathezoko]] || [[word:judathezoko|judathezoko]] || [[word:shudathezoko|shudathezoko]] || [[word:kudathezoko|kudathezoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodathezoko|thodathezoko]] || [[word:jodathezoko|jodathezoko]] || [[word:shodathezoko|shodathezoko]] || [[word:kodathezoko|kodathezoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠdathezoko|thĂŠdathezoko]] || [[word:jĂŠdathezoko|jĂŠdathezoko]] || [[word:shĂŠdathezoko|shĂŠdathezoko]] || [[word:kĂŠdathezoko|kĂŠdathezoko]]
|-

|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadathezoko|thadathezoko]] || [[word:jadathezoko|jadathezoko]] || [[word:shadathezoko|shadathezoko]] || [[word:kadathezoko|kadathezoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadathezoko|thadathezoko]] || [[word:jadathezoko|jadathezoko]] || [[word:shadathezoko|shadathezoko]] || [[word:kadathezoko|kadathezoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
